rationale: The work belongs to the existing BGSTAB scope and extends implemented Wave4/Wave6/Wave7 stability contracts with a new ConPTY-specific planning and implementation surface. The Wave6 Settings exclusion is scoped to selected Wave6 fields, so this run adds later ConPTY Settings requirements instead of discarding or demoting FR-BGSTAB-013.

affected_existing_reqs.diff_summary: adds ConPTY-specific runtime settings and validation contract
adds recovery input release ordering around existing input backpressure
applies output scheduler principles to recovery writes
preserves terminal payload ordering without making split WebSocket a prerequisite
adds priority-aware safe-send, projected buffers, and byte-aware replay/repair handling
adds later ConPTY Settings fields beyond Wave6 selected resource fields
adds recovery write gate and runtime recovery metrics
adds deterministic redraw flood and ConPTY soak validation
preserves stop.bat and no broad node.exe termination validation constraints
